cmd:
python3 - <<'PY'
import json,os,urllib.request
KEY=os.environ.get("N8N_API_KEY","")
BASE="https://irynakarmazina.app.n8n.cloud/api/v1"
r=urllib.request.Request(BASE+"/workflows/Iz77H1Al7RoHAbNp",headers={"X-N8N-API-KEY":KEY})
d=json.loads(urllib.request.urlopen(r,timeout=30).read().decode("utf-8","ignore"))
print("NAME:",d.get("name"),"| active",d.get("active"))
print("--- NODES ---")
for n in d.get("nodes",[]):
    t=n.get("type","").split(".")[-1]
    if t=="stickyNote": continue
    print(t,"|",n.get("name"))
    p=n.get("parameters",{})
    if t=="set":
        for a in (p.get("assignments",{}) or {}).get("assignments",[]):
            print("     field:",a.get("name"),"=",a.get("value"),"(",a.get("type"),")")
    if t=="if":
        for c in (p.get("conditions",{}) or {}).get("conditions",[]):
            op=c.get("operator",{})
            print("     cond:",c.get("leftValue"),op.get("type"),op.get("operation"),"->",c.get("rightValue"))
    if t=="switch":
        for v in (p.get("rules",{}) or {}).get("values",[]):
            conds=[(c.get("leftValue"),c.get("operator",{}).get("operation"),c.get("rightValue")) for c in (v.get("conditions",{}) or {}).get("conditions",[])]
            print("     rule out=",v.get("outputKey"),"conds=",conds)
        print("     fallbackOutput:",p.get("options",{}).get("fallbackOutput"))
print("--- CONNECTIONS ---")
for src,val in d.get("connections",{}).items():
    outs=val.get("main",[])
    for i,o in enumerate(outs):
        print(src,"[out",i,"]->",[t.get("node") for t in (o or [])])
PY
